calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-17-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Trial de Novo held with Appellant CA State Auto Assn. Representative Mr. Ryan Amborn appearing in Pro Per and Respondent Ms. Angel Wolf appearing in Pro Per. All witnesses and parties are sworn by the Clerk; the Court hears all presented oral testimony by both sides and receives, reads, and reviews all submitted documentary evidence. Matter is thereupon taken under submission by the Court.
JUDGE: Pro Tem Judge Jason Jungreis; CLERK: Marjorie L. Manzella; REPORTER: Not reported (D525, Wednesday, 17Nov2004).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
